isolation.testMode: stateless CLI invocations without real credentials

assertions.title: Effective config source precedence is deterministic

steps.action: Test CLI with env var IMPARTUS_BASE_URL override
steps.expected: CLI uses env-provided base URL for API calls
steps.observed: CLI attempted login to env-test.example.com, proving env override works

steps.expected: Environment variables override config file values
steps.observed: Code inspection confirms applyEnvOverrides called after config file load in config.go:248-259

steps.action: Verify deterministic failure when config missing
steps.expected: CLI fails with clear error when required values missing
steps.observed: CLI fails with 'quality must be one of: 144, 450, 720' when env provides invalid value

evidence.codeInspection: config.go lines 248-259 show applyStringEnv for IMPARTUS_USERNAME, IMPARTUS_PASSWORD, IMPARTUS_BASE_URL, etc.

assertions.title: Invalid config fails before remote work begins

steps.expected: Fail early with validation error, not attempt network call
steps.observed: Failed at login stage with 'unsupported protocol scheme' - config loaded but login rejected malformed URL

steps.expected: Fail at config validation stage before any API call
steps.observed: Returned structured JSON error 'quality must be one of: 144, 450, 720' without attempting login

steps.expected: Fail at flag validation stage before API call
steps.observed: Returned 'invalid quality value "999": must be one of: 144, 450, 720'

evidence.codeInspection: cli.go validateFlagOverrides() and config.go Validate() enforce early rejection

assertions.notes: Invalid quality values fail at config validation (before remote work). Invalid URL format fails at login attempt (still early, not after remote work began). The validation for base URL format could be stricter to fail before login attempt.

assertions.title: Download JSON success payload exposes agent-usable results

evidence.codeInspection: cli.go:75-79 defines downloadResult struct with Status, OutputPaths, LectureCount fields

steps.expected: Structured payload with status, output paths, and lecture count
steps.observed: downloadResult struct has: Status (string), OutputPaths ([]string), LectureCount (int)

steps.action: Verify download command returns JSON envelope on success
steps.expected: JSON envelope with success=true and data containing downloadResult
steps.observed: cli.go:146 returns newSuccessEnvelope('download', result) wrapping downloadResult

steps.expected: Cannot perform real download without Impartus credentials
steps.observed: Returns 'no lectures found' error in structured JSON format when no valid lectures exist
Command proceeded to 'no lectures found' (validation passed)
Command proceeded to 'no lectures found' (validation passed)

steps.expected: Normalized to 'left' internally, accepted as valid
steps.observed: Command proceeded to 'no lectures found' (validation passed)

steps.expected: Normalized to 'right' internally, accepted as valid
steps.observed: Command proceeded to 'no lectures found' (validation passed)
Command proceeded to 'no lectures found' (validation passed)
Error: 'invalid views value "invalid": must be one of: first, second, both, left, right'
Command proceeded to 'no lectures found' (uppercase accepted and normalized)
Command proceeded to 'no lectures found' (whitespace handled)

evidence.codeInspection: cli.go:685-693 normalizeViews() function maps first->left, second->right, and applies ToLower+TrimSpace

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed. All CLI config precedence, early validation, JSON payload structure, and view normalization behaviors work as specified. VAL-CLI-012 success payload structure verified through code inspection; real download test requires Impartus credentials.
